varieties.name: 🧬 HYBRID = First-generation crosses (F1) between distinct parent lines.
Greek Oregano (True Greek) 🏆
varieties.origin: Greece (wild-collected from mountainsides), ancient cultivation (4000+ years)
varieties.traits: Bushy perennial, 30-45cm tall, dark green slightly hairy leaves, purple-brown stems, white flowers
varieties.availability: Widely available in Australian nurseries and seed suppliers (The Seed Collection, Bunnings, local herb nurseries)

varieties.name: Greek Kaliteri Oregano 🏆
varieties.origin: Greece (commercial cultivation), 'Kaliteri' means 'the best' in Greek
varieties.traits: Compact, hardy, small thick leaves with silvery hairs, purple undersides, tall bloom stalks
varieties.yield_notes: High productivity when grown in preferred conditions
varieties.availability: Specialty herb nurseries, online Australian suppliers

varieties.name: Italian Oregano (Common Italian) 🏆
varieties.origin: Italy, Mediterranean region, traditional cultivation near Bologna
varieties.traits: Bushy spreading perennial, 30-60cm tall, ovate dark green leaves, purple-pink flowers
varieties.availability: Widely available - The Seed Collection, Succeed Heirlooms, most nurseries

varieties.name: Wild Oregano (Wild Marjoram) 🏆
varieties.origin: Mediterranean region, naturalized worldwide, ancient use
varieties.traits: Hardy perennial to 90cm tall, green to grey-green leaves, purple-pink flowers
varieties.yield_notes: High productivity, can be harvested 8-10 weeks after sowing

varieties.name: Hot & Spicy Oregano
varieties.origin: Cultivar selection, Mediterranean heritage
varieties.traits: Similar size to common oregano (30-60cm), deep green foliage, vigorous growth
varieties.availability: Australian herb nurseries, specialty suppliers

varieties.name: Golden Oregano (Aureum)
varieties.origin: Cultivar selection, awarded Royal Horticultural Society Award of Garden Merit
varieties.traits: Compact 15-30cm tall, bright golden-yellow leaves (greener in shade), light pink flowers
varieties.availability: Australian nurseries, ornamental herb suppliers

varieties.name: Variegated Oregano
varieties.origin: Cultivar selection
varieties.traits: Compact 30cm tall, green leaves edged with creamy white, white to pink flowers

varieties.name: Compact Oregano (Compactum)
varieties.origin: Cultivar selection
varieties.traits: Dense, dark green groundcover, low-growing habit (15-20cm)
varieties.availability: Specialty herb nurseries in Australia

varieties.name: Australian Native Oregano 🌏
varieties.origin: Native to temperate regions of South Australia, New South Wales, Victoria, and Tasmania
varieties.traits: Ornamental shrub up to 2m tall, small round strongly aromatic leaves, lilac/pink/white flowers in spring
varieties.availability: Melbourne Bushfood, Bunnings Australia, Fruitopia Nursery (Brisbane/Gold Coast), native plant nurseries throughout Queensland

varieties.name: Turkish Oregano (Pot Marjoram) 🏆
varieties.origin: Greece, Turkey, Sicily, east Mediterranean area
varieties.traits: Perennial up to 100cm tall, distinguished by spikes arranged in false corymbs
varieties.availability: Specialty herb suppliers, imported seeds

varieties.name: Sweet Marjoram (Knotted Marjoram) 🏆
varieties.origin: Mediterranean region, ancient cultivation by Egyptians, Greeks, and Romans
varieties.traits: Semi-evergreen compact perennial, grey-green to grey leaves, white flowers in clusters (resembling knots before blooming)
varieties.availability: Herb nurseries, seed suppliers throughout Australia

varieties.name: Syrian Oregano (Za'atar, Bible Hyssop) 🏆
varieties.origin: Eastern Mediterranean, Middle East (Syria, Lebanon, Israel), thought to be biblical hyssop
varieties.traits: Upright subshrub to 1m tall (can reach 4ft when blooming), velvety grey-green leaves, white to pale pink flowers
varieties.availability: Mountain Valley Growers (online), specialty Middle Eastern herb suppliers, limited in Australia

varieties.name: Kent Beauty
varieties.origin: Hybrid developed in UK
varieties.traits: Low-growing 15cm tall × 30cm wide, grey-green foliage, large pink and green papery bracts resembling hops
varieties.availability: Ornamental nurseries in Australia, specialty suppliers

varieties.name: Hopley's Purple Oregano
varieties.origin: Hopley's Nursery, UK introduction
varieties.traits: 45-75cm tall and wide, purple-red stems, dark green leaves, purplish-pink flowers with dark purple bracts
varieties.availability: Australian ornamental herb suppliers

varieties.name: Dittany of Crete (Hop Marjoram) 🏆
varieties.origin: Endemic to Crete, Greece; ancient medicinal herb
varieties.traits: Small 15-30cm tall, silver-frosted woolly leaves, cascading pink bracts with silvery-lavender flowers
varieties.availability: Limited availability in Australia, specialty ornamental suppliers

varieties.name: Cuban Oregano (Indian Borage) 🌏
varieties.origin: Native to Eastern/Southern Africa, naturalized throughout tropics including India, Southeast Asia
varieties.traits: Succulent perennial 30-90cm tall × 60-120cm wide, thick fleshy oval leaves 5-10cm, velvety hairy, lime-green to grey-green
varieties.availability: Widely available throughout India/Kerala, tropical plant nurseries, easy to propagate from cuttings, common in home gardens

varieties.name: Cuban Oregano Variegated
varieties.origin: Cultivar selection of C. amboinicus
varieties.traits: Similar size to standard form, beautifully variegated grey/white/green leaves
varieties.availability: Specialty plant nurseries in India, online tropical plant suppliers

varieties.name: Asian Oregano (Indian Oregano) 🌏
varieties.origin: Central Asia, Iran, India, Turkey, Afghanistan, Pakistan
varieties.traits: Glossy green leaves, pink flowers, ornamental value, grows well in pots/containers
varieties.availability: Indian Spices Board, northern India suppliers, limited in Kerala

varieties.name: Mexican Oregano 🏆
varieties.origin: Southwestern United States (Texas, New Mexico), Mexico, Central America (to Nicaragua)
varieties.traits: Woody shrub/small tree 1-2.7m (3-9ft) tall, fragrant white/yellowish flowers year-round (especially after rains)
varieties.availability: International seed suppliers, specialty herb importers, limited in India

varieties.name: Wild Oregano (for Kerala) 🏆
varieties.origin: Mediterranean, cultivated worldwide
varieties.traits: Hardy perennial, 30-90cm tall, grey-green to green leaves
varieties.availability: International seed suppliers

varieties.name: Greek Oregano (for Kerala - Advanced Growers) 🏆
varieties.origin: Greece, Balkans, Turkey, Cyprus
varieties.traits: Dark green, slightly hairy foliage, vigorous hardy growth
varieties.availability: International suppliers, rarely successful in Kerala climate

varieties.name: Sweet Marjoram (for Kerala) 🏆
varieties.origin: Mediterranean, Cyprus, ancient cultivation
varieties.traits: Semi-evergreen compact herb, grey-green leaves, white flowers
varieties.availability: International seed suppliers, specialty herb importers

varieties.name: Italian Oregano (for Kerala) 🏆
varieties.origin: Italy, Mediterranean
varieties.traits: Bushy spreading perennial, dark green leaves, purple-pink flowers
